title: Ahkeratmehilaiset/waggledance-swarm
summary: Local-first AI runtime that routes 10k+ solver descriptors at warm p99 0.05 ms (1000/1000 hits, zero fallback) and spawns 1004 live agent clones in 120 s. Hex-mesh routing, MAGMA-audited provenance, agent-bridge autonomy fabric. Profile S (fully offline) or Profile L (opt-in cloud). BUSL.

title: alexvilelabah/bah-browser
summary: Bah - an AI browser (Perplexity Comet-style) by VilelaLab. Type plain-language commands and the agent clicks and types for you. Works free out of the box, or use your own key (DeepSeek/Mistral/NVIDIA) or a local model (Ollama). Electron + React + TypeScript.

title: cozuXI/opencode_webui_cli
summary: 💻 Build and manage projects efficiently with the OpenCode Web UI CLI, featuring a chat interface, file previews, and model selection.

title: skp2001vn/agentic-graphql-assistant

title: gentry-king/agent-infrastructure-stack
summary: 🤖 Build and manage a production-grade agent infrastructure stack using TypeScript, Node.js, and Terraform for seamless deployment and robust performance.

title: hwdsl2/docker-ollama
summary: Docker image to run an Ollama local LLM server. Secure by default, all API requests require a Bearer token (auto-generated on first start). OpenAI-compatible API. Supports first-start model pre-pull, NVIDIA GPU (CUDA) acceleration, and persistent model storage. Multi-arch: amd64, arm64.

title: hwdsl2/docker-litellm
summary: Docker image for a self-hosted LiteLLM AI gateway proxy. Unified OpenAI-compatible API for 100+ LLM providers. Features auto-config on first start, virtual key management, spend tracking, and persistent data via Docker volume.

title: Dada-papa/CodeStory-AI
summary: 📚 Automate your code documentation with CodeStory AI, an intelligent VS Code extension that keeps your project well-documented and up-to-date effortlessly.

title: pogo899GX/nl-eval-observability-feedback-loops
summary: 🔍 Demonstrate evaluation, observability, and feedback loops for production AI systems with a clear, minimal C# console app example.

title: carlos132nx/ralph-mcp
summary: 🚀 Streamline parallel development with Ralph MCP: run multiple PRDs in isolated workspaces, ensuring quality and efficient merging.
